About Fronds

Growers first,
shopkeepers second.
We're a small plant studio helping real apartments turn into tiny jungles — one honest recommendation at a time.

<!-- @license lucide-static v1.17.0 - ISC -->
<svg
  class="lucide lucide-book-open"

  stroke-width="2"
  stroke-linecap="round"
  stroke-linejoin="round"
>
  <path d="M12 7v14" />
  <path d="M3 18a1 1 0 0 1-1-1V4a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h5a4 4 0 0 1 4 4 4 4 0 0 1 4-4h5a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v13a1 1 0 0 1-1 1h-6a3 3 0 0 0-3 3 3 3 0 0 0-3-3z" />
</svg>
Our story

Started on a fire escape,
moved to a corner shop.

Fronds began as a weekend cutting-swap on a Brooklyn fire escape. Five years and a few thousand repottings later, we're a small team of growers and designers helping people keep plants alive in real apartments — the dim ones, the dry ones, the cat-occupied ones.
We still grow slowly, buy from nurseries we know by name, and answer every care question ourselves.

What we believe
Small studio, stubborn values.

<!-- @license lucide-static v1.17.0 - ISC -->

</svg>
Grow slow
Seasonal varieties in small batches beat a warehouse of stressed monsteras every time.
Waste less
Compostable packaging, returned-pot credit, and cuttings that get a second life on the swap shelf.

Teach everything
Workshops, care cards, and honest advice — including "that corner is too dark, save your money."
